message:
feat(Lib): Implement 4 core CPython internal modules

Implements full functionality for:
- _pyio.zig: Python I/O hierarchy (IOBase, FileIO, BufferedReader,
  BufferedWriter, TextIOWrapper, StringIO, BytesIO)
- _pydecimal.zig: Decimal floating-point (Context, Rounding modes,
  Signals, Decimal type with parse/format)
- _compat_pickle.zig: Python 2/3 pickle compatibility mappings
  (NAME_MAPPING, IMPORT_MAPPING for module/import translation)
- _opcode_metadata.zig: Bytecode opcode metadata (OpcodeCategory,
  OpcodeFlags, StackEffect, 30+ opcode definitions, CompareOp, BinaryOp)

All modules include comprehensive tests.
